clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the processing, evaluation, and regulation of physiological arousal, subjective feelings, and emotional valences typically mediated by insulo-cingulate and amygdalar pathways.
This cluster encompasses the computation of incentives, expected outcomes, and reward-based reinforcement learning foundational to goal-directed behavior mapped largely to striato-cortical circuitry.

This cluster represents the internally directed modeling of self and others, including autobiographical projection and interpersonal reasoning, which consistently co-activate within the default mode network.
